tweets.text:
配信あざした！序盤負けまくったけど後半からエンジンかかってきて配信内でチャンピオン級乗れました！！
元々フロルを使いたくて組んだ構築のはずなのにフロルだけ弱すぎて大泣き、この枠変えたら構築完成しそう
レンタルと配分貼っときます！使い方はアーカイブとリプ欄へ↓

Let’s talk the Ddee/Rishi team

You know how you can deal with Sun + Rain? Just deny both! 

Altaria is a perfect match for Perish Song because it gets Perish Song, turns off weather, is Bulky, and gets moves like Will o Wisp, Roost, Fire Spin etc. It’s hard to remove (10/11)

Let’s talk the Edu team:

Rain combos really well with Perish because you can use it to slow down ZardY’s offense. Swampert can also blow through unprepared teams with fast immediate offense

And in the end game if you eliminate the right two mons Arch is near unstoppable (9/11)

There are two flavors of Perish that are really popping off right now

The 1st is a Rain Perish team pioneered by @MeninoJardim 

The 2nd is Altaria Perish pioneered by @ddee_ssbu & @MrRishiTTV 

Both teams are very real and are seeing success on ladder and tournaments (2/11)

Team Spotlight: Perish Trap!

It took me a while to write this up because I am not a Perish Player. It’s been on the rise but I genuinely didn’t understand why

But after a week I think I know why Perish is back in a big way. So let’s dive in to this unique archetype (1/11)
